calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Dec-15-2003 Off Calendar

MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Dec-10-2003 Continued To Dec-15-03 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 206

MANDATORY SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Dec-10-2003 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE this day in Dept. 218.
Commissioner Sue M. Kaplan, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha/V. Mack. Reporter: Rhonda Fung #4819
Appearances:
Joseph Sacramento, Esq., for and with Plaintiff Rafael Linasan.
No appearance by the Defendants.
Jury demand is stricken, DEC-15-2003 court trial date confirmed at 9:00 am in Dept. 206.

DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Nov-10-2003 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES:
NO APPEARANCES ON THIS MATTER. THE COURT took Claimant LEADELL JENKINS' DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT off calendar -- Court doesn't have jurisdiction in absence of proof of filing by Leadell Jenkins of a prejudgment claim of right to possession. Off calendar, Leadell Jenkin is not a party and cannot file a demurrer. (301/JLW/KM-X) Reporter: Christina Paxton, CSR #1558

DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Nov-03-2003 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
NO APPEARANCES ON THIS MATTER. THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING: DEFENDANT RACHEL FIAPOTO'S DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT -- Sustained with 5 days leave to amend to show Emelita Linasan is also a landlord if plaintiff can do so in good faith. (301/JLW/AC) Reporter: Christina Paxton, CSR #1558
